reference: My eighteen-month-old child has developed small tiny spots covering his chest up to the top of his diaper and his back. He hasn't had a temperature, but he has been off his food and very whiny and tired lately. Can you advise? He has already had chickenpox, but the spots don't look like those anyway.
text: My eighteen-month-old child has developed small, tiny spots covering his chest up to the top of his diaper in his back. He hasn't had a temperature, but he has been off his feed and very whiny and tired lately. We advise he has already had chickenpox, but the spots don't look like those any more.
